## USER (2026-07-20 10:07:07)

cc怎么打开auto-mode?

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 10:07:19)

[{'type': 'thinking', 'thinking': 'The user is asking how to enable "auto-mode" in Claude Code. They\'re asking in Chinese. Auto-mode in Claude Code refers to the permission mode where tools are automatically approved without prompting.\n\nLet me answer directly - in Claude Code, you can enable auto-accept mode (which automatically approves tool calls) by pressing Shift+Tab to cycle through permission modes, or using the `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag, or setting it in the terminal.\n\nActually, let me think more carefully. In Claude Code, the permission modes are:\n- Normal mode (default) - asks for permission\n- Auto-accept mode - automatically accepts tool calls\n- Plan mode - Claude plans but doesn\'t execute\n\nYou can toggle between these modes with Shift+Tab or by typing `/auto-accept` to jump directly to auto-accept mode.', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 10:07:20)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': '在 Claude Code 中开启 auto-accept 模式（自动批准工具调用）：\n\n- **快捷键**：在输入提示符处按 **Shift+Tab** 循环切换模式（Plan → Normal → Auto-accept）\n- **启动时指定**：`claude --dangerously-skip-permissions`（跳过所有权限提示，注意安全风险）\n\n按 Shift+Tab 切换后，左下角会显示当前模式状态。'}]

---

## USER (2026-07-20 10:07:50)

auto mode unavaible for this model怎么办？

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 10:07:55)

[{'type': 'thinking', 'thinking': 'The user is saying that auto mode is unavailable for their current model (Opus 4.6). This is a known limitation - auto-accept mode may not be available for all models in Claude Code.\n\nLet me think about what options they have:\n\n1. They could use `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag when launching Claude Code\n2. They could configure permissions in settings to allow specific tools without prompting\n3. They could switch to a model that supports auto mode\n\nLet me provide practical alternatives.', 'signature': ''}]

---

## ASSISTANT (2026-07-20 10:08:00)

[{'type': 'text', 'text': 'Opus 4.6 目前不支持 auto-accept 模式。替代方案：\n\n1. **配置权限允许列表** — 在 `.claude/settings.json` 中预先批准常用工具，减少弹窗：\n   ```\n   /permissions\n   ```\n   或手动编辑 settings 添加 `allowedTools`。\n\n2. **启动时跳过权限**：\n   ```bash\n   claude --dangerously-skip-permissions\n   ```\n   这会跳过所有确认提示（注意安全风险）。\n\n3. **切换到支持 auto 的模型**（如 Sonnet），用 `/model` 切换后再开启 auto。\n\n最实用的是方案 1 — 把你常用的 Bash 命令、Read、Edit 等加入允许列表，效果接近 auto 模式但更安全。需要我帮你配置吗？'}]

---
